summary: Frontend testing of 5 new Spanish (ES) feature pages + 1 new Armenian (HY) MICE slug. Verified rendering, content localization, hreflang tags, sitemap.xml validity, and regression across en/fr/ru/hy for existing routes. All new /es/... routes load without 404 and render in Spanish. Sitemap.xml is well-formed and contains all 6 new URLs with proper hreflang alternates.

integration_issues.issue: /es/transporte-mice-paris (and other MICE language variants) do NOT emit <link rel='alternate' hreflang='...'> tags in the document <head>. Sitemap.xml has them correctly, but the page-level hreflang metadata (which search engines also crawl) is absent. CityTransferPage-based pages (VTC7/8, Hotels, BusinessPartners) correctly emit all 6 hreflang links (en, fr, ru, hy, es, x-default). Pre-existing gap in MICETransportation.js, but worth adding a Helmet/SEOHead block. Note: comment on line 495 says 'URL MAP (for language switcher + canonical/hreflang)' but no head emission uses it.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add <link rel='alternate' hreflang='...'> tags to MICETransportation.js document head using react-helmet-async (import { Helmet }) so all 5 language variants emit hreflang links (en/fr/ru/hy/es + x-default). Sitemap.xml already lists them.
OPTIONAL: content.hy MICE has no metaTitle/metaDescription — only title/description are localized. Verify if that is intentional.
critical_code_review_comments: MICETransportation.js is 800+ lines — consider splitting content dictionaries into a separate module to keep the component under 700 LOC.
MICETransportation.js lacks any react-helmet/SEOHead emission for hreflang/canonical/og:image meta, unlike CityTransferPage-based pages. Pre-existing.

LanguageProvider initial useState('en') causes a brief render in English before URL prefix detection swaps to /es/ language on mount — may cause SEO/FOUC concerns for crawlers that don't run JS. Consider SSR-safe initialisation from window.location.pathname directly in useState.

success_rate.frontend: 100% for new routes + regression; 1 SEO gap on MICE hreflang head tags

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 new routes work: /es/vtc-7-plazas, /es/vtc-8-plazas, /es/quiosco-reserva-hotel, /es/socios-comerciales, /es/transporte-mice-paris, /mice-transport-pariz-hy. First test run had a language-caching artifact because LanguageContext starts with useState('en') and switches to 'es' only on mount effect; clearing localStorage then reloading produces clean Spanish render. This is expected behaviour. Verified with clean state - all pages fully Spanish/Armenian. Regression on /vtc-7-seats (en), /vtc-7-places (fr), /mice-transportation-paris (en), /transport-mice-paris (fr), /mice-transport-parij (ru) passes. Sitemap.xml validated with ElementTree — well-formed XML with all 6 new URL entries and hreflang alternates.
